soulmate_aspects.description: Harmonious connections that indicate deep compatibility and understanding

aspects.description: Strong emotional and spiritual bond. Jupiter provides wisdom and protection to Moon's emotions.
Harmonious love, shared values, and mutual respect. Blessings in relationship.
Classic compatibility - conscious and unconscious alignment. Masculine-feminine balance.
Generosity in love, shared joy, and abundance in relationship.
Emotional and affectionate harmony. Natural comfort and care.

indicators: Partner's Jupiter aspects Moon or Venus

karmic_aspects.description: Challenging connections indicating past-life ties and lessons

aspects.description: Authority and ego clashes. Saturn restricts Sun's expression. Karmic debt around power.
Emotional coldness or responsibility. Saturn brings maturity but can create distance.
Delays in love, age difference, or feeling unloved. Serious commitment potential.
Obsessive emotional attachment. Illusion and confusion in feelings.
Intense attraction that may not be grounded in reality. Obsessive love.
Past-life love connection. Detachment or disillusionment in love.

indicators: Saturn aspects personal planets (Sun, Moon, Venus)

aspects.description: Strong sexual attraction balanced with harmony. Passion and affection combined.
Intense sexual chemistry. May be overwhelming or exhausting.
Magnetic attraction but friction. Passionate conflicts. Love-hate dynamic.
Similar energy levels and sexual drives. Good physical compatibility.
Similar love languages and aesthetic preferences. Comfort in affection.

house_overlays.description: When partner's planets fall in specific houses of your chart

significant_overlays.description: Partner influences your identity and self-expression
Partner affects your home and emotional security
Partner activates your relationship sector - significant for marriage
Partner triggers deep intimacy and transformation - intense sexual connection
Partner connects to your subconscious - hidden or karmic relationship

composite_indicators.description: Midpoint chart indicators for relationship quality
positive: Composite Sun conjunct Venus or Jupiter
Composite Moon in harmonious aspect to Sun
challenging: Composite Saturn conjunct Sun or Moon
